canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<title>transit</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #000; overflow: hidden; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let w, h, cx, cy;
let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
let audioCtx, oscillators = [], noiseNode, noiseGain;
let audioStarted = false;
let hueShift = 0;
let targetHue = 0;
let speed = 1;
let transitPhase = 0;

const rings = [];
const stars = [];
const debris = [];

function resize() {
    w = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    h = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    cx = w / 2;
    cy = h / 2;
}

function initRings() {
    rings.length = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) {
        rings.push({
            z: i * 50 + Math.random() * 30,
            wobblePhase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
            wobbleAmp: 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.03,
            segments: 32 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 16),
            distortion: Math.random() * 0.3
        });
    }
}

function initStars() {
    stars.length = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < 200; i++) {
        const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
        const dist = 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.7;
        stars.push({
            angle: angle,
            dist: dist,
            z: Math.random() * 3000,
            brightness: 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.7,
            size: 0.5 + Math.random() * 1.5
        });
    }
}

function initDebris() {
    debris.length = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
        debris.push({
            angle: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
            dist: 0.1 + Math.random() * 0.4,
            z: Math.random() * 2000,
            rotSpeed: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.1,
            size: 2 + Math.random() * 4,
            rotation: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2
        });
    }
}

function startAudio() {
    if (audioStarted) return;
    audioStarted = true;
    
    audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    
    // Deep rumble drone
    const freqs = [40, 60, 80, 120];
    freqs.forEach((f, i) => {
        const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
        const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
        osc.type = 'sine';
        osc.frequency.value = f;
        gain.gain.value = 0.03 / (i + 1);
        osc.connect(gain);
        gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
        osc.start();
        oscillators.push({ osc, gain, baseFreq: f });
    });
    
    // Whooshing noise
    const bufferSize = audioCtx.sampleRate * 2;
    const buffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, audioCtx.sampleRate);
    const data = buffer.getChannelData(0);
    for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) {
        data[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
    }
    
    noiseNode = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
    noiseNode.buffer = buffer;
    noiseNode.loop = true;
    
    const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
    filter.type = 'bandpass';
    filter.frequency.value = 200;
    filter.Q.value = 0.5;
    
    noiseGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    noiseGain.gain.value = 0.08;
    
    noiseNode.connect(filter);
    filter.connect(noiseGain);
    noiseGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    noiseNode.start();
}

function project(x, y, z) {
    const fov = 400;
    const scale = fov / (z + fov);
    return {
        x: cx + x * scale + (mouseX - cx) * 0.05 * scale,
        y: cy + y * scale + (mouseY - cy) * 0.05 * scale,
        scale: scale
    };
}

function getColor(z, hue) {
    const maxZ = 3000;
    const t = 1 - z / maxZ;
    const baseHue = (280 + hue) % 360; // purple base
    const h = (baseHue + t * 60) % 360; // shift toward pink/cyan
    const s = 80 + t * 20;
    const l = 20 + t * 50;
    return `hsla(${h}, ${s}%, ${l}%, ${0.3 + t * 0.7})`;
}

function drawRing(ring, time) {
    const wobble = Math.sin(time * 0.5 + ring.wobblePhase) * ring.wobbleAmp;
    const baseRadius = 800 + Math.sin(time * 0.3 + ring.z * 0.01) * 50;
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    for (let i = 0; i <= ring.segments; i++) {
        const a = (i / ring.segments) * Math.PI * 2;
        const distort = 1 + Math.sin(a * 3 + time + ring.z * 0.005) * ring.distortion;
        const r = baseRadius * distort * (1 + wobble);
        
        const x = Math.cos(a) * r;
        const y = Math.sin(a) * r;
        
        const p = project(x, y, ring.z);
        
        if (i === 0) {
            ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y);
        } else {
            ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y);
        }
    }
    ctx.closePath();
    
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, 400);
    const innerColor = getColor(ring.z, hueShift);
    const outerColor = getColor(ring.z, hueShift + 40);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, 'transparent');
    gradient.addColorStop(0.7, innerColor);
    gradient.addColorStop(1, outerColor);
    
    ctx.strokeStyle = getColor(ring.z, hueShift);
    ctx.lineWidth = Math.max(0.5, (1 - ring.z / 3000) * 3);
    ctx.stroke();
}

function drawStar(star, time) {
    const x = Math.cos(star.angle) * star.dist * 1500;
    const y = Math.sin(star.angle) * star.dist * 1500;
    
    const p = project(x, y, star.z);
    
    if (p.scale < 0.01) return;
    
    // Stretch based on z-velocity (creates star trails)
    const stretch = Math.min(speed * 15, 50);
    const alpha = star.brightness * p.scale * 2;
    
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);
    ctx.rotate(Math.atan2(p.y - cy, p.x - cx));
    
    const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(-stretch, 0, star.size * p.scale * 3, 0);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${(190 + hueShift) % 360}, 100%, 80%, 0)`);
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, `hsla(${(190 + hueShift) % 360}, 100%, 90%, ${alpha})`);
    gradient.addColorStop(1, `hsla(${(320 + hueShift) % 360}, 100%, 70%, ${alpha * 0.5})`);
    
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.fillRect(-stretch, -star.size * p.scale * 0.5, stretch + star.size * p.scale * 3, star.size * p.scale);
    
    ctx.restore();
}

function drawDebris(d, time) {
    const x = Math.cos(d.angle) * d.dist * 1000;
    const y = Math.sin(d.angle) * d.dist * 1000;
    
    const p = project(x, y, d.z);
    
    if (p.scale < 0.02) return;
    
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);
    ctx.rotate(d.rotation);
    
    const size = d.size * p.scale * 10;
    const alpha = Math.min(1, p.scale * 3);
    
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${(280 + hueShift) % 360}, 60%, 30%, ${alpha})`;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, -size);
    ctx.lineTo(size * 0.7, size * 0.5);
    ctx.lineTo(-size * 0.7, size * 0.5);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();
    
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${(320 + hueShift) % 360}, 80%, 50%, ${alpha * 0.8})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.stroke();
    
    ctx.restore();
}

function drawCenterVortex(time) {
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, 150);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${(190 + hueShift) % 360}, 100%, 90%, 0.8)`);
    gradient.addColorStop(0.3, `hsla(${(280 + hueShift) % 360}, 80%, 50%, 0.3)`);
    gradient.addColorStop(0.7, `hsla(${(320 + hueShift) % 360}, 60%, 30%, 0.1)`);
    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx, cy, 150, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Inner light spiral
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(cx, cy);
    ctx.rotate(time * 0.5);
    
    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        ctx.rotate(Math.PI / 2);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
        for (let j = 0; j < 30; j++) {
            const t = j / 30;
            const r = t * 100;
            const a = t * Math.PI * 2;
            ctx.lineTo(Math.cos(a) * r, Math.sin(a) * r);
        }
        ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${(190 + hueShift) % 360}, 100%, 80%, ${0.3})`;
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.stroke();
    }
    ctx.restore();
}

function drawExitHorizon(time) {
    // Distant exit point - the "other side"
    const pulse = 1 + Math.sin(time * 2) * 0.2;
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, 80 * pulse);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${(180 + hueShift) % 360}, 100%, 95%, 1)`);
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, `hsla(${(200 + hueShift) % 360}, 90%, 70%, 0.5)`);
    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx, cy, 80 * pulse, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
}

function update(time) {
    // Move everything toward camera
    const baseSpeed = 8 * speed;
    
    rings.forEach(ring => {
        ring.z -= baseSpeed;
        if (ring.z < -100) {
            ring.z += 3000;
            ring.wobblePhase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
        }
    });
    
    stars.forEach(star => {
        star.z -= baseSpeed * 1.5;
        if (star.z < -100) {
            star.z += 3000;
            star.angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
            star.dist = 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.7;
        }
    });
    
    debris.forEach(d => {
        d.z -= baseSpeed * 0.8;
        d.rotation += d.rotSpeed;
        d.angle += 0.002;
        if (d.z < -100) {
            d.z += 2000;
            d.angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
        }
    });
    
    // Smooth hue transition
    hueShift += (targetHue - hueShift) * 0.02;
    
    // Transit phase cycles
    transitPhase += 0.001;
    speed = 1 + Math.sin(transitPhase) * 0.3;
    
    // Update audio
    if (audioStarted && oscillators.length) {
        oscillators.forEach((o, i) => {
            const freq = o.baseFreq * (1 + speed * 0.2);
            o.osc.frequency.setTargetAtTime(freq, audioCtx.currentTime, 0.1);
        });
        if (noiseGain) {
            noiseGain.gain.setTargetAtTime(0.05 + speed * 0.05, audioCtx.currentTime, 0.1);
        }
    }
}

function draw(time) {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);
    
    // Sort by z for proper layering
    const sortedRings = [...rings].sort((a, b) => b.z - a.z);
    const sortedStars = [...stars].sort((a, b) => b.z - a.z);
    const sortedDebris = [...debris].sort((a, b) => b.z - a.z);
    
    // Draw distant stars first
    sortedStars.forEach(s => drawStar(s, time));
    
    // Draw rings (the wormhole structure)
    sortedRings.forEach(r => drawRing(r, time));
    
    // Draw floating debris
    sortedDebris.forEach(d => drawDebris(d, time));
    
    // Draw center vortex/exit
    drawCenterVortex(time);
    drawExitHorizon(time);
}

function loop(timestamp) {
    const time = timestamp * 0.001;
    update(time);
    draw(time);
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}

// Events
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    mouseX = e.clientX;
    mouseY = e.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', e => {
    startAudio();
    // Shift to new destination
    targetHue = (targetHue + 60 + Math.random() * 60) % 360;
    speed = 2;
    setTimeout(() => speed = 1, 500);
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
    startAudio();
    targetHue = (targetHue + 60 + Math.random() * 60) % 360;
}, { passive: true });

// Init
resize();
initRings();
initStars();
initDebris();
requestAnimationFrame(loop);
</script>
</body>
</html>
